Index.description: Halkalı Nazmi Arıkan Science Academy — Comprehensive high school and university prep programs (YKS, TYT, AYT) in Küçükçekmece.

Hero.title: The Road to Success
Hero.subtitle: The right place to reach your target university in YKS.
Hero.headline: We Chart the Path to Your Goal Together
Hero.slogan: We stand by you with experienced teachers, individual follow-up and proven study programs.

HeroMain.subtitle: The right place to reach your target university in YKS. We stand by you with experienced teachers, individual follow-up and proven study programs.

Services.meta_description: Comprehensive and personalized study programs for high school and graduates, focused on YKS, TYT and AYT.
Services.title: Our Programs
Services.subtitle: Expertly designed study programs tailored to each student's goal.

7-sinif.title: 7th Grade
7-sinif.description: Preparation for 8th grade by strengthening middle school foundations. 12 lesson hours per week, ÖZDEBİR publications.
7-sinif.hero_quote: A strong foundation builds a bright future.
7-sinif.intro: Our 7th grade program aims to help students build a solid foundation in Math, Science, Turkish and Social Studies. Supported by ÖZDEBİR publications, the 12-hour-per-week program covers the current year and the critical 8th grade process together.
7-sinif.body: Each student's progress is individually monitored through regular topic tests and parent information reports.
7-sinif.phase1_text: In-depth coverage of Math, Science, Turkish and Social Studies topics.
7-sinif.phase2_text: Regular topic tests and assessment exams. Parent information reports.
7-sinif.phase3_text: Advisor teacher support that individually monitors each student's development process.
7-sinif.result_text: Strong foundational knowledge, exam habits and smooth transition to the 8th grade program.
7-sinif.tech_intro: We use ÖZDEBİR publications in this program. Weekly lesson hours: 12.
7-sinif.tech_tools: Subject instruction · Test solving · Homework tracking · Parent meetings
7-sinif.meta_description: Comprehensive 12-hour-per-week program supported by ÖZDEBİR publications for 7th grade students.

8-sinif.title: 8th Grade & LGS
8-sinif.description: Intensive preparation for LGS. 14 lesson hours per week with Apotemi publications toward your target school.
8-sinif.hero_quote: With the right strategy and intensive study, your target school is within reach in LGS.
8-sinif.intro: Our 8th grade program is a comprehensive LGS-focused preparation process. Supported by Apotemi publications, the 14-hour-per-week program familiarizes students with the LGS format and maximizes their net score.
8-sinif.body: Continuous improvement is achieved through weekly LGS mock exams and detailed performance analysis.
8-sinif.phase1_text: Systematic revision of all LGS topics and addressing weak points.
8-sinif.phase2_text: Weekly LGS-format mock exams and detailed performance analysis.
8-sinif.phase3_text: Exam motivation, time management and techniques for coping with exam anxiety.
8-sinif.result_text: Achieving a high net score in LGS and placing in a science high school, Anatolian high school or target school.
8-sinif.tech_intro: We use Apotemi publications in this program. Weekly lesson hours: 14.
8-sinif.tech_tools: LGS topic revision · Weekly mock exam · Net analysis · Psychological support
8-sinif.meta_title: 8th Grade & LGS Preparation | Halkalı Science Academy
8-sinif.meta_description: Intensive 14-hour-per-week preparation program for LGS supported by Apotemi publications.

10-sinif.title: 10th Grade
10-sinif.description: Strategic program to strengthen high school foundations. 3 days a week, 14 lesson hours, Nazmi Arıkan Science Publications.
10-sinif.hero_quote: 10th grade is the real beginning of the YKS journey.
10-sinif.intro: Our 10th grade program ensures students build a strong foundation in core subjects and transition to 11th grade well-prepared. Note: Field selection takes place in 11th grade.
10-sinif.body: TYT foundational skills and core subject content are developed with individual tracking guided by our expert teaching staff.
10-sinif.phase1_text: Systematic instruction and reinforcement in Turkish, Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, History and Geography.
10-sinif.phase2_text: Developing TYT foundational skills in Turkish, Math, Science and Social Studies.
10-sinif.phase3_text: Expert guidance on field selection (made in 11th grade), career planning and YKS goal setting.
10-sinif.result_text: Strong high school foundation and a ready start to the 11th grade program.
10-sinif.tech_title: Nazmi Arıkan Science Publications · 3 days/week, 14 lesson hours
10-sinif.tech_intro: We use Nazmi Arıkan Science Publications in this program. 3 days per week, 14 total lesson hours.
10-sinif.tech_tools: Turkish · Mathematics · Physics · Chemistry · Biology · History · Geography
10-sinif.meta_description: Strategic 3-days-per-week, 14-lesson-hours preparation program for 10th grade students.

11-sinif.title: 11th Grade
11-sinif.description: Critical period of YKS preparation. 16 total lesson hours, Nazmi Arıkan Science Publications.
11-sinif.hero_quote: 11th grade is the year your YKS success takes shape.
11-sinif.intro: Our 11th grade program is the critical period when YKS preparation intensifies. Supported by Nazmi Arıkan Science Publications, the 16-hour program covers both TYT and AYT topics. Regular mock exams are held every week.
11-sinif.body: Continuous performance is monitored through weekly mock exams and development charts.
11-sinif.phase1_text: Sequential coverage of all TYT and relevant AYT topics with topic-based test applications.
11-sinif.phase2_text: Regular weekly YKS mock exams and development charts. Additional study plans for weak topics.
11-sinif.phase3_text: Maintaining motivation throughout the long preparation process and creating an effective study schedule.
11-sinif.result_text: Transitioning to 12th grade with a strong YKS foundation and superior performance in the target score type.
11-sinif.tech_title: Nazmi Arıkan Science Publications · 16 total lesson hours
11-sinif.tech_intro: We use Nazmi Arıkan Science Publications in this program. 16 total lesson hours. Weekly mock exams included.
11-sinif.tech_tools: TYT & AYT topics · Weekly mock exam · Performance report · Motivation
11-sinif.meta_description: 11th grade YKS preparation program. 16 total lesson hours, Nazmi Arıkan Science Publications.

12-sinif.title: 12th Grade & YKS
12-sinif.description: Intensive YKS preparation. 16 lesson hours per week, full coverage and mock analysis.
12-sinif.hero_quote: This year is the year to turn all your dreams into reality.
12-sinif.intro: Our 12th grade program is the final and most critical process leading to YKS. With 16 lesson hours per week, topic revision, mock analysis and psychological support are carried out together.
12-sinif.body: The most efficient preparation process with 1 full YKS mock exam per week, detailed net analysis and university placement guidance.
12-sinif.phase1_text: Accelerated revision of all TYT and AYT topics. Individual plans focused on weak points.
12-sinif.phase2_text: 1 full YKS mock exam per week, detailed net analysis and question-based evaluation sessions.
12-sinif.phase3_text: Comprehensive guidance and placement list creation for university and department selection after YKS.
12-sinif.result_text: Reaching the desired score in YKS and placing in the target university and department.
12-sinif.tech_intro: We use all YKS publications in this program. Weekly lesson hours: 16. 1 mock exam per week.
12-sinif.tech_tools: Accelerated revision · 1 mock exam/week · Net analysis · Placement guidance
12-sinif.meta_title: 12th Grade & YKS Preparation | Halkalı Science Academy
12-sinif.meta_description: 12th grade YKS program. 16 lesson hours per week, 1 mock exam per week and university placement guidance.

mezun.title: Graduate & YKS
mezun.description: YKS preparation program specially designed for graduates. 18 lesson hours. One-on-one lesson opportunities.
mezun.hero_quote: Learn from last year, make your mark this year.
mezun.intro: Our graduate program is specially designed for students seeking another chance in YKS. With one-on-one teacher support, focus is directed toward the goal. The program consists of 18 total lesson hours.
mezun.body: A personalized study plan is created by analyzing previous YKS results.
mezun.phase1_text: Identification of previous YKS results and weak topics. Personalized study program.
mezun.phase2_text: Intensive study on priority topics. Instant feedback through one-on-one lessons.
mezun.phase3_text: Regular full YKS mock exams and detailed analysis sessions for progress tracking.
mezun.result_text: Score improvement in YKS and placement in the target university.
mezun.tech_intro: We use all YKS publications in this program. The program consists of 18 total lesson hours.
mezun.tech_tools: Individual analysis · One-on-one lessons · 18 lesson hours · Placement support
mezun.meta_title: Graduate & YKS Program | Halkalı Science Academy
mezun.meta_description: One-on-one lessons and 18-lesson-hour YKS preparation program for graduate students.

deneme-kulubu.title: Mock Exam Club
deneme-kulubu.description: Regular YKS mock exams, net analysis and peer learning. Open to all grade levels.
deneme-kulubu.hero_quote: Every mock exam takes you one step forward.
deneme-kulubu.intro: The Mock Exam Club aims to provide regular exam experience to high school and graduate students at all levels. Weekly YKS format mock exams and detailed net analysis.
deneme-kulubu.body: Students continuously improve through group evaluation sessions and peer learning.
deneme-kulubu.phase1_text: Full weekly mock exams in YKS format. Practice under real exam conditions.
deneme-kulubu.phase2_text: Topic-based net analysis after mock exams, individual review of incorrectly answered questions.
deneme-kulubu.phase3_text: Group sessions where students evaluate together and peer learning.
deneme-kulubu.result_text: Continuously increasing net score, exam habits and strengthened confidence.
deneme-kulubu.tech_intro: Weekly mock exams in YKS format. Analysis sessions included.
deneme-kulubu.tech_tools: Weekly mock exam · Net analysis · Group evaluation · Progress tracking
deneme-kulubu.meta_title: Mock Exam Club | Halkalı Science Academy
deneme-kulubu.meta_description: Weekly YKS format mock exams, net analysis and group evaluation.

rehberlik.title: Guidance
rehberlik.description: One-on-one psychological and academic guidance for career planning, motivation and exam anxiety.
rehberlik.hero_quote: Success comes with working in the right direction. Our guidance program helps you determine the direction.
rehberlik.intro: Our guidance program is a comprehensive counseling service that supports academic and personal development. Exam anxiety, career planning and parent communication are conducted together.
rehberlik.body: The process is transparently monitored through one-on-one sessions and regular parent reports.
rehberlik.phase1_text: One-on-one counseling on goal setting, field selection and creating a study plan.
rehberlik.phase2_text: Expert support for exam anxiety, low motivation and stress management.
rehberlik.phase3_text: Regular parent meetings and student progress reports.
rehberlik.result_text: Students with high confidence, goal-oriented focus and strong motivation.
rehberlik.tech_intro: One-on-one meeting opportunity with an expert teacher and counselor staff.
rehberlik.tech_tools: One-on-one sessions · Career plan · Parent report · Motivational support
rehberlik.meta_description: One-on-one guidance for career planning, exam anxiety management and motivation.

12-sinif-vip.title: 12th Grade VIP
12-sinif-vip.description: VIP classes of 5-8 students, 16 lesson hours/week, 45 mock exams and 40 hours of individual tutoring.
12-sinif-vip.hero_quote: In this final year before YKS, every student deserves individual attention – our VIP program delivers exactly that.
12-sinif-vip.intro: Our 12th Grade VIP program keeps class sizes between 5-8 students. Students attend a total of 16 lesson hours per week (two days on weekends, two days on weekdays). Each student can solve questions one-on-one with their teacher and receive up to 40 individual tutoring hours throughout the year.
12-sinif-vip.body: Through the Kunduz program, students can ask teachers questions anytime and anywhere. The Baykuş library program allows evening study sessions under teacher supervision. Mock exams are held every two weeks, and personalized study schedules targeting weak areas are prepared from analyses. Education coaches monitor these schedules weekly and share updates with parents. AI-powered individual question banks are created, and motivation workshops and concentration tests are applied regularly. University visits, goal-setting sessions, speed reading techniques, summer camps and mid-term camps are all integral parts of the program.
12-sinif-vip.phase1_text: 16 lesson hours/week in classes of 5-8 students. Individual attention guaranteed with up to 40 hours of personal tutoring per year.
12-sinif-vip.phase2_text: 45 TYT-AYT mock exams per year, national ranking results and AI-powered personal question bank creation.
12-sinif-vip.phase3_text: Weekly individual counseling, education coach monitoring, university introductions and regular parent updates.
12-sinif-vip.result_text: Reaching the target score in YKS and securing a place at the desired university by making the most of every moment throughout the year.
12-sinif-vip.tech_title: VIP Program · 16 lesson hours/week · 45 Mock Exams
12-sinif-vip.tech_intro: Intensive lessons in small classes, individual tutoring and AI-powered analysis offered together.
12-sinif-vip.tech_tools: Small class (5-8 students) · 16 hours/week · 45 mock exams · 40 hours tutoring
12-sinif-vip.meta_description: 12th Grade VIP program. 5-8 students per class, 16 hours/week, 45 mock exams and 40 hours of tutoring.

mezun-vip.title: Graduate VIP
mezun-vip.description: VIP classes of 5-8 students, 18 lesson hours/week, 2 mock exams per week and 40 hours of individual tutoring.
mezun-vip.hero_quote: Preparing for YKS one more year is not starting over – it is continuing stronger.
mezun-vip.intro: Our Graduate VIP program keeps class sizes between 5-8 students. Students receive a total of 18 lesson hours per week, take individual question-solving sessions with their teachers, and can access up to 40 individual tutoring hours throughout the year.
mezun-vip.body: Through the Kunduz program, students can reach teachers at any time and place. The Baykuş library program allows evening study under teacher supervision. Two mock exams are held per week, and AI-powered analyses create personalized question banks tailored to each student's level and weak areas. Weekly individual counseling sessions are conducted, coaches monitor programs and update parents regularly. The program begins with a Summer Camp for an early start, and university introduction events, motivation activities and camp programs are conducted throughout the year.
mezun-vip.phase1_text: 18 lesson hours/week in classes of 5-8 students. Up to 40 hours of individual tutoring and continuous teacher access.
mezun-vip.phase2_text: 2 YKS mock exams per week with AI-powered weak area analysis and student-specific question bank creation.
mezun-vip.phase3_text: Early start with a Summer Camp, weekly individual counseling, parent tracking and university introduction events.
mezun-vip.result_text: Achieve the target YKS score and secure admission to the desired university and department.
mezun-vip.tech_title: VIP Graduate Program · 18 lesson hours/week · 2 Mock Exams/Week
mezun-vip.tech_intro: Intensive lessons in small classes, AI-powered analysis and Summer Camp kickoff for a strong YKS preparation.
mezun-vip.tech_tools: Small class (5-8 students) · 18 hours/week · 2 mock exams/week · 40 hours tutoring
mezun-vip.meta_description: Graduate VIP program. 5-8 students per class, 18 hours/week, 2 mock exams per week and 40 hours of tutoring.

ozel-ders.title: Private Tutoring
ozel-ders.description: Fully personalized one-on-one lessons with expert instructors, tailored to each student's needs.
ozel-ders.hero_quote: Every student is unique; the greatest progress lies in a program designed just for you.
ozel-ders.intro: Our Private Tutoring program provides one-on-one guidance tailored to each student's needs and is designed to maximize academic achievement.
ozel-ders.body: Our expert instructors analyze each student's strengths and areas for improvement to create a fully personalized learning plan. This enables students to better understand topics they find challenging and achieve higher performance in exams.
ozel-ders.phase1_text: The student's current level and weak areas are identified to create a personalized roadmap.
ozel-ders.phase2_text: The expert instructor prepares a one-on-one lesson plan targeting identified weaknesses and implements it with the student.
ozel-ders.phase3_text: Progress is evaluated after every session and the program is updated according to the student's evolving needs.
ozel-ders.result_text: Eliminating weak areas, improving exam performance and reaching target scores.
ozel-ders.tech_intro: A personal learning experience fully shaped around the student's needs, guided by an expert instructor.
ozel-ders.tech_tools: One-on-one teaching · Personalized plan · Expert instructor · Continuous tracking
ozel-ders.meta_description: One-on-one private tutoring program. Personalized lesson plans with expert instructors.

About.meta_title: About Us | Halkalı Nazmi Arıkan Science Academy
About.meta_description: A well-established educational institution since 1995. Experienced teachers, individual tracking and proven results.
About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: Education in Halkalı Since 1995
About.content: Halkalı Nazmi Arıkan Science Academy was founded in 1995 with the aim of providing quality education to students in the region. Over the years, we have helped thousands of students reach their target universities.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: To be a trusted, well-established educational institution that students in Halkalı and its surroundings have relied upon since 1995, providing the highest quality of education in the most accessible way. Beyond guiding our students to their academic goals, our vision is to cultivate confident, critical-thinking individuals who contribute meaningfully to society. Positioning ourselves as a nationally recognized institution that places successful graduates in Turkey's top universities year after year, setting the benchmark for quality preparatory education.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: To support every student in discovering their individual potential, developing their strengths and resolutely reaching their academic goals. To stand by our students from the very first day of the year to the YKS exam — making a genuine difference through our experienced and dedicated faculty, personalized tracking system, regular mock exams and comprehensive guidance services. Believing that academic success arises from the union of disciplined effort and authentic motivation, our mission is to implement — every single day — an educational philosophy that equips our students not only with knowledge but also with character.

founder.text: Quality in education is not a destination but an endless pursuit that continues in every student.

items.name: Ayşe K.
items.text: With the support I received throughout 12th grade, I reached my target score in YKS. Our teachers were truly very attentive.

items.name: Murat T. (Parent)
items.text: My son studied here in 11th and 12th grade and won a place at a medical faculty. We were amazed by the individual attention.

items.name: Selin A.
items.text: With the graduate program, I won my target department in my second year. The guidance service was invaluable.

items.name: Kerem B.
items.text: I've been here since 11th grade. Thanks to the Mock Exam Club, my exam anxiety went away and I entered YKS with confidence.

items.name: Zeynep Ö. (Parent)
items.role: Daughter placed at her target university via YKS
items.text: My daughter has been here since 10th grade. Both academic and psychological support were excellent.

items.name: Emre D.
items.text: I joined the program in 12th grade. Thanks to the intensive schedule and personalized lessons, I got into ITU.

items.name: Neslihan A. (Parent)
items.text: The teachers' individual attention to each student amazed us. My son gained confidence in a very short time.

items.name: Can T.
items.text: The detailed mock exam analyses helped me identify and close the gaps in my knowledge. I got a great result in YKS.
